drugs.ind: LEMTRADA is indicated for the treatment of relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis (MS), to include relapsing-remitting disease and active secondary progressive disease, in adults. Because of its safety profile, use is generally recommended in patients who have had an inadequate response to two or more MS therapies.
